description_long: This is a luxurious, mid-century modern swivel chair with a matching ottoman, reminiscent of the iconic Eames Lounge Chair. The chair features a deep, tufted black leather upholstery on both the seat and backrest, providing plush comfort and a sophisticated look. The outer shell is crafted from curved, polished wood panels, adding warmth and contrast to the dark leather. The chair and ottoman both rest on sturdy, black metal bases with four splayed legs, ensuring stability and a contemporary aesthetic. The armrests are thickly padded and seamlessly integrated into the seat, while the backrest is high and gently reclined for ergonomic support. Visible hardware on the rear of the chair hints at robust construction and a classic design ethos.
description: A high-end, black leather and wood swivel chair with a matching ottoman, featuring tufted upholstery, padded armrests, and a sturdy metal base.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tufted black leather seat and backrest, padded armrests, and the ottoman aligned directly in front.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the chair's reclined back, thick cushioning, and the curved wooden shell, with the ottoman positioned in front.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the polished wood back panel, visible metal hardware, and the central support structure of the chair.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view displays the chair's ergonomic contour, wood paneling, and the relationship between the chair and ottoman.
attribute_central_support_column: A black, fixed, metal column with a four-pronged base, providing stable support and allowing for swivel functionality.
attribute_seat_back_design: Tall, gently reclined, and contoured with deep button tufting, upholstered in black leather and encased in a curved wooden shell.
attribute_armrest_style: Thick, padded, and upholstered in black leather, seamlessly integrated into the seat structure with a rounded, ergonomic shape.
